2605.00913.title: Leveraging Imperfect Medical Data: A Manifold-Consistent Spatio-Temporal Network for Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition
2605.00913.paper_summary: Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition (HAR) has attracted increasing attention in medical and healthcare monitoring, particularly with the growth of Internet of Medical Things (IoMT). However, in real-world wearable sensing scenarios, IoMT signals are often corrupted by missing measurements, sensor failures, and environmental noise, which significantly degrade the performance of conventional deep learning models that assume clean and complete inputs. To address this challenge, we propose a Manifold-Consistent Spatio-Temporal Network (MCSTN) for robust HAR under imperfect sensing conditions. The proposed framework introduces a dual-level corruption modeling mechanism that simulates realistic sensor imperfections through both physical-level corruption and diffusion-driven continuous corruption. By enforcing representation consistency across multiple corrupted views, the model learns stable and corruption-invariant semantic representations. Furthermore, we design a dual-stream spatio-temporal architecture that explicitly decouples temporal dynamics modeling and spatial correlation learning. The temporal stream captures long-term activity dynamics, while the spatial stream models inter-sensor relationships, enabling more effective spatio-temporal representation learning. Extensive experiments on three widely used HAR benchmark datasets, PAMAP2, Opportunity, and WISDM, demonstrate that the proposed MCSTN achieves competitive performance compared with existing state-of-the-art methods, particularly under imperfect sensing conditions. These results validate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework for real-world wearable IoMT sensing applications.
2605.00913.paper_summary_zh: 感測器基礎的人類活動識別（HAR）在醫療和健康監測領域受到越來越多的關注，特別是在醫療物聯網（IoMT）增長的背景下。<lb/>然而，在現實世界的可穿戴感測場景中，IoMT信號經常受到缺失測量、感測器故障和環境噪聲的干擾，這顯著降低了假設輸入乾淨且完整的傳統深度學習模型的性能。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了一種流形一致的時空網絡（MCSTN），以在不完美的感測條件下實現穩健的HAR。<lb/>所提出的框架引入了一種雙層腐敗建模機制，通過物理層腐敗和擴散驅動的持續腐敗來模擬現實的感測器缺陷。<lb/>通過在多個腐敗視圖之間強制表示一致性，該模型學習穩定且不受腐敗影響的語義表示。<lb/>此外，我們設計了一種雙流時空架構，明確地將時間動態建模和空間相關性學習解耦。<lb/>時間流捕捉長期活動動態，而空間流則建模感測器之間的關係，使得時空表示學習更加有效。<lb/>在三個廣泛使用的HAR基準數據集PAMAP2、Opportunity和WISDM上進行的廣泛實驗表明，所提出的MCSTN在不完美的感測條件下與現有的最先進方法相比，達到了具有競爭力的性能。<lb/>這些結果驗證了所提出框架在現實世界可穿戴IoMT感測應用中的有效性和穩健性。
2605.00913.author: Jiangtao Fan et.al.
2605.00913.authors: Jiangtao Fan, Anish Jindal, Amir Atapour-Abarghouei
